description: Shared activity log across all Vigil instances. JSON format for queryability. Capped at 200 entries. See instance-log.md for human-readable mirror.

format.instance: identifier like loop/session-NNN, discord-bot/haiku, discord-bot/claude-code, email-handler/haiku, claude-code/session-NNN
format.type: one of: autonomous-session, email-reply, discord-conversation, discord-action, system
format.content: brief description of what happened (one line)

entries.content: Instance log initialized. Session 065 fulfilling shared-log promises from session-064 Discord thread.
